description: You are a Sustainability Analyst at a multi-facility manufacturing company preparing the annual GHG Inventory and Carbon Abatement Business Case for the CFO. Using the workbook 'facility_emissions.xlsx' in the ExcelTasks folder on the Desktop, complete the 'Emissions_Summary' and 'Project_IRR' sheets. In 'Emissions_Summary', calculate Scope 1 emissions for Natural Gas (0.05306 MT CO2e/MMBtu), Diesel Fleet (0.01020 MT CO2e/gallon), and Refrigerants for all facilities. Calculate Scope 2 Electricity emissions using the eGRID RFCW factor (0.000380 MT CO2e/kWh) for OH, PA, and IL facilities, and the eGRID NEWE factor (0.000218 MT CO2e/kWh) for the MA facility. Determine Total Scope 1+2, Carbon Cost ($50/MT CO2e), Company Totals, and Emissions Intensity per FTE and per square foot. In 'Project_IRR', calculate the Annual Energy Savings, Annual Carbon Savings, Annual Carbon Value ($50/MT), Net Annual Benefit, NPV (8% discount rate), IRR, and Simple Payback for the three abatement projects using the provided specifications and cost assumptions. Save the updated workbook to ~/Desktop/ExcelTasks/facility_emissions.xlsx.

metadata.dataset: EPA 40 CFR Part 98 Table C-1 emission factors (NG: 53.06 kg CO2/MMBtu, Diesel: 10.21 kg CO2/gal); EPA eGRID 2022 electricity factors (RFCW: 0.000380 MT CO2e/kWh, NEWE: 0.000218 MT CO2e/kWh); URL: https://www.epa.gov/egrid/download-data
